common.tagline: Focused preparation for state government examinations.
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
common.offline: You are offline. We will retry automatically.

auth.mfaPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
auth.studentNotice: Student accounts always receive the Student role. Course access is controlled by entitlements.
auth.staffNotice: There is no role selector. The backend loads your assigned role and permissions after sign-in.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

invitation.expired: This invitation has expired. Ask an administrator to resend it.

errors.PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests. Please slow down.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong on our side.
